name: OpenAustralia
description: A free platform that makes Australian parliamentary information more accessible — searchable Hansard, email alerts when your MP speaks, and tools for tracking political activity. Built by the OpenAustralia Foundation.
whyUseIt: OpenAustralia makes parliamentary monitoring easy for anyone. Set up email alerts for your MP or for specific topics, search Hansard with a better interface than the official APH site, and track what your representatives are actually doing in parliament.
marketerWorkflow: Set up alerts for key issues and target MPs, use search to find relevant parliamentary debates, share clips and quotes via social media for civic engagement campaigns
managerExpects: Automated monitoring of what competing MPs are saying in parliament about your issues

vocabulary.definition: An automated email notification when a specific keyword or MP appears in parliamentary proceedings
A measure of how often an MP speaks, asks questions, and participates in debates

beginnerMistakes: Setting up too many alerts and getting overwhelmed — focus on your key issues and competitors
Not cross-referencing with TheyVoteForYou to compare words with votes
